headline.headline_text: Source-conditional Hold (neutral-positive on near-term execution; bear-skewed asymmetry on 2028 Keytruda LOE) at $112.56, base case PT $124.88 derived from FY27E non-GAAP EPS $9.25 (S4: Visible Alpha n=25 median $9.25 range $8.80-9.70) × 13.5x P/E (S5: peer median ex-LLY 13.5x large-pharma; MRK 5y median 13.8x trailing). 12-month median expected return +5.1%; scenario-weighted range [-48%, +94%], CONDITIONAL on (i) Keytruda subQ Qlex conversion trajectory holding $128M Q1 2026 run-rate → ~$1.0B+ annualized by FY26 exit (S2: Merck Q1 2026 8-K) AND (ii) pipeline NPV risk-adjusted at ~$25B by 2030 (S3: Merck investor day commentary; promotion path via individual asset Phase 3 readouts). If Keytruda Q2 2026 print shows subQ conversion <30% OR ifinatamab deruxtecan PDUFA 2026-10-10 negative OR IRA IPAY 2027 list adds Keytruda Part B candidate, downgrade to Sell. If subQ conversion >50% confirmed AND multiple pipeline assets approve, upgrade to Buy.
